description_long: This helmet features a futuristic, high-tech design with a predominantly black dome and metallic silver structural elements. The front faceplate is a dark, glossy surface with illuminated blue circular and linear graphics, suggesting a digital interface or heads-up display. Large, over-ear padded sections on each side are detailed with mechanical components, dials, and illuminated accents, giving the helmet a robust, cybernetic appearance. The top and sides are adorned with small colored arrows, caution markings, and subtle geometric patterns, enhancing its advanced aesthetic. The rear of the helmet displays a 'CAUTION' label and additional mechanical detailing, while the overall build appears solid and protective. The helmet's materials suggest a combination of hard plastics, metal, and synthetic padding, with visible wiring and connectors for electronic integration.
description: A futuristic, black and silver helmet with illuminated blue graphics, mechanical side components, and a digital faceplate. It features caution markings, colored arrows, and robust over-ear sections.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the 'CAUTION' label, mechanical connectors, and the helmet's solid back structure.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the mechanical ear section, red and green dials, and colored arrow graphics on the dome.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the glossy, digital faceplate with blue illuminated graphics and symmetrical over-ear components.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible dials, wiring, and arrow graphics on the helmet's surface.
attribute_graphic_design: Abstract design with colored arrows, caution markings, and illuminated blue digital interface graphics.
